name: @stackra/i18n
purpose: Unified internationalization runtime — translation engine, locale management, RTL/LTR direction, Intl formatting, and a Vite plugin for auto-discovery.
capabilities: Translation engine with ICU-style plurals + interpolation
Vite plugin for build-time catalogue discovery
React + React Native bindings (t, useLocale, Trans)
when_to_use: Rendering user-facing copy in multiple locales with RTL support and per-package catalogue discovery.
when_not_to_use: For domain-specific display terms use @stackra/settings terminology overrides; for date/number formatting use @stackra/support Num + Intl.
